description: Beta patch: align DevFlow task artifacts with check agents and document parent/child task trees in workflow guidance.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(workflow): document parent/child task tree planning in `workflow.md`, `devflow-brainstorm`, and `devflow-meta` references. Planning breadcrumbs now remind agents that multi-deliverable work should use independently verifiable child tasks and explicit child artifact dependencies.

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(agents): `devflow-check` agents across platforms now read task `prd.md`, `design.md` when present, and `implement.md` when present before checking code against specs. Pi implement/check agents now list the same task artifact order.
notes: Run `npm install -g @enpd/devflow@beta` and `devflow update` to refresh workflow and agent templates. No file migration is required.
